name: monad
description: Local, single-user daemon for running agentic sessions, with a CLI and web UI.
author: Monadix Labs, Inc.

scripts.build: bun run i18n:types && turbo run build
scripts.build:release: bun run i18n:types && bun run scripts/build-release.ts
scripts.docker:shell: docker buildx bake --file docker/docker-bake.hcl shell && docker run --rm -it -e PATH="/opt/monad/local-bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin" monad-shell:dev bash
scripts.docker:test:e2e:live: docker buildx bake --file docker/docker-bake.hcl --load test-e2e-live && docker run --rm -e OPENROUTER_API_KEY -e MONAD_LIVE_MODEL monad-e2e-live:dev /e2e-live.sh
scripts.test: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test --output-logs=errors-only
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:daemon && bun run test:e2e:web
scripts.test:e2e:daemon: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test:e2e --filter=@monad/monad --output-logs=errors-only
scripts.test:e2e:daemon:loud: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test:e2e:loud --filter=@monad/monad
scripts.test:e2e:loud: bun run test:e2e:daemon:loud && bun run test:e2e:web:loud
scripts.test:loud: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test:loud
scripts.test:unit: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test:unit --output-logs=errors-only
scripts.test:unit:loud: bun run i18n:types && turbo run test:unit:loud
scripts.typecheck: bun run i18n:types && turbo run typecheck
